description: Google Ads tag with two variants via template_options.type: remarketing (collects visitors for remarketing lists) or conversion_tracking (tracks conversions from campaigns). Both require conversion_id (number after AW-). Conversion tracking also requires conversion_label (and optionally conversion_value). Install remarketing tag first; add conversion tracking for specific conversion actions.

when_to_use: Building audiences and measuring campaign conversions
common_use_cases: Remarketing: add visitors to lists for retargeting
Conversion tracking: track signups, purchases, downloads

template_options.type.description: Selects remarketing or conversion tracking. Required.

options.remarketing: Adds Google tag to collect visitors for remarketing lists. Requires conversion_id. Use All page views trigger.
options.conversion_tracking: Tracks conversions. Requires conversion_id and conversion_tracking.conversion_label. Use trigger matching conversion action (e.g. thank-you page).

template_options.description: Google Ads configuration. Must include type and conversion_id. For conversion_tracking, also conversion_tracking.conversion_label.

template_options.conversion_id.description: Google tag ID - number after AW-. Remarketing: from Google Ads > Audience manager > Your data sources > Google tag. Conversion: from conversion action event snippet (first number in AW-***/***).

template_options.conversion_tracking.conversion_label: Required. Second number after / in event snippet (AW-***/conversion_label). From Google Ads > Goals > Conversions > conversion action > Tag setup.
template_options.conversion_tracking.conversion_value: Optional. Conversion value (number or variable reference).

template_options.conversion_tracking.description: Required when type is conversion_tracking. Contains conversion_label (required) and conversion_value (optional).

structure.conversion_label: string - Conversion label from Google Ads
structure.conversion_value: number or variable reference - Optional conversion value

respect_visitors_privacy.description: Respect DNT and opt-out. Off by default.

disable_in_debug_mode.description: Disable when Tag Manager is in debug mode

remarketing.description: Google Ads Remarketing - collect visitors for lists
remarketing.prerequisite: Get conversion_id from Google Ads > Tools > Shared library > Audience manager > Your data sources > Google tag (number after AW-). Use All page views trigger.

conversion_tracking.description: Google Ads Conversion Tracking - track conversions
conversion_tracking.prerequisite: Create conversion action in Google Ads > Goals > Conversions. Get conversion_id and conversion_label from event snippet (AW-***/***). Use trigger matching conversion (e.g. thank-you page). Install remarketing tag first.

common_mistakes: Using full Google tag ID (AW-123456789) - use only the number
Using page_view trigger for conversion_tracking - use conversion-specific trigger
Installing conversion tracking before remarketing tag

conversion_not_tracking: Verify conversion_id and conversion_label from event snippet
Use trigger that fires on conversion action (thank-you page, form submit)
